array_types.name: CC_Registers
array_types.code: type CC_Registers is array (0 .. 3) of CC_Register;

array_types.name: EVENTS_COMPARE_Registers
array_types.code: type EVENTS_COMPARE_Registers is array (0 .. 3) of EVENTS_COMPARE_Register;

array_types.name: EVTEN_COMPARE_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type EVTEN_COMPARE_Field_Array is array (0 .. 3) of EVTEN_COMPARE0_Field
  with Component_Size => 1, Size => 4;

EVTENSET_COMPARE_Field_Array
INTENCLR_COMPARE_Field_Array
INTENSET_COMPARE_Field_Array

record_types.name: CC_Register
COUNTER_Register
EVENTS_COMPARE_Register
EVENTS_OVRFLW_Register
EVENTS_TICK_Register
EVTEN_COMPARE_Field
EVTEN_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Enable or disable event routing for OVRFLW event

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Enable or disable event routing for COMPARE[0] event

record_types.name: EVTENCLR_COMPARE_Field
EVTENCLR_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable event routing for OVRFLW event

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable event routing for COMPARE[0] event

record_types.name: EVTENSET_COMPARE_Field
EVTENSET_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable event routing for OVRFLW event

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable event routing for COMPARE[0] event

record_types.name: INTENCLR_COMPARE_Field
INTENCLR_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for OVRFLW event

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Write '1' to Disable interrupt for COMPARE[0] event

record_types.name: INTENSET_COMPARE_Field
INTENSET_Register

fields.name: TICK
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for OVRFLW event

fields.name: Reserved_2_15
fields.description: Write '1' to Enable interrupt for COMPARE[0] event

record_types.name: PRESCALER_Register
RTC_Peripheral

fields.name: EVENTS_OVRFLW
fields.description: Description collection[0]: Compare event on CC[0] match

fields.name: COUNTER
fields.description:
12 bit prescaler for COUNTER frequency (32768/(PRESCALER+1)).Must be
written when RTC is stopped

record_types.name: TASKS_CLEAR_Register
TASKS_START_Register
TASKS_STOP_Register
TASKS_TRIGOVRFLW_Register

variables.name: RTC0_Periph
variables.code:
RTC0_Periph : aliased RTC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RTC0_Base;

variables.code:
RTC1_Periph : aliased RTC_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RTC1_Base;

variables.name: RTC2_Periph

  with Import, Address => RTC2_Base;
